title: Cohere Embedding
description: Represents the embedding output from the Cohere Embed API, including vector representations in multiple numeric formats.

id.description: Unique identifier for the embedding request.

embeddings.description: Container for embedding vectors organized by type. Each type maps to an array of embedding vectors.

float.description: Default float embeddings for each input. Supported with all Embed models.

int8.description: Signed int8 embeddings for each input. Supported with Embed v3.0 and newer models.

uint8.description: Unsigned int8 embeddings for each input. Supported with Embed v3.0 and newer models.

binary.description: Signed binary embeddings for each input. Supported with Embed v3.0 and newer models.

base64.description: Base64-encoded embeddings for each input. Supported with Embed v3.0 and newer models.

texts.description: The text entries for which embeddings were returned.

images.description: The image entries for which embeddings were returned.

EmbeddingInputType.description: The type of input for embedding generation. Determines how the model processes the input.

TruncateOption.description: How to handle inputs longer than the maximum token length.
